center.name: Hawaiian tropical rainforests
center.summary: Hawaiian tropical rainforests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Maui parrotbill、小夏威夷绿雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It can only be found in of mesic and wet forests at on the windward slopes of Haleakalā. This species is critically endangered, with an estimated population in 2016 of 250-540 individuals, but more recent estimates of less than 150 individuals. Fossil evidence indicates that the bird could at one time be seen in dry forests at elevations as low as , as well as on the island of Molokai

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Anianiau are found in mesic and wet forests at elevations above
